title: Metal Mayhem at $\rm z \sim 7-10$: Diversity and Evolution of Gas-Phase Metallicity Gradients
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables. Submitted to MNRAS
summary: We present a JWST/NIRSpec-IFU study of metallicity gradients in seven low-metallicity systems at $z=7.2-9.5$. The main sample spans stellar masses of $\rm \log(M_*/M_{\odot}) \sim 7.8-9.5$, star formation rates (SFRs) of $\rm \log(\text{SFR} / M_{\odot} \text{yr}^{-1}) \sim 0.5-2.5$, and gas-phase metallicities of $4\%-15 \%~Z_\odot$. Within our sample, we also identify three low-metallicity satellite galaxies associated with two of our sources, providing a rare view of early-epoch interactions. The three satellites exhibit even more primordial properties, with metallicity $3\% -4\% ~Z_\odot$ and low star-formation activity ($\rm \log(\text{SFR} / M_{\odot} \text{yr}^{-1}) \sim -0.5$ to $-0.9$). We find that our galaxies, and especially the satellites, are significantly offset from the local Fundamental Metallicity Relation (FMR), with deviations reaching $Δ\text{FMR} \approx -0.9$ dex. This indicates that these galaxies are likely experiencing strong accretion of pristine gas. Overall, we observe a large scatter in radial metallicity gradients, ranging from positive to negative with an average metallicity gradient of $\rm -0.02 \pm 0.04 \ dex \ kpc^{-1}$. Flat gradients are found in systems with confirmed satellites, suggesting that tidal interactions and mergers drive the radial mixing necessary to homogenise the interstellar medium. The (tentative) presence of an AGN in two of our sources suggests that strong feedback may also be responsible for the observed flat gradients. Conversely, the detection of a positive gradient in one source points toward a direct funnelling of metal-poor gas inflow into the central region of the galaxy. These results show that galaxies in the first billion years grow through diverse, episodic processes, suggesting that early evolution is characterised by structural variety rather than a single, predictable path.

AI.tldr: JWST观测发现早期宇宙（z=7.2-9.5）低金属丰度星系存在多样化的金属丰度梯度，卫星星系偏离本地基本金属丰度关系，表明存在原始气体吸积和相互作用驱动的星际介质混合。
AI.motivation: 研究早期宇宙（红移z=7.2-9.5）星系的金属丰度梯度分布，探索星系在宇宙最初十亿年内的演化机制，特别是低金属丰度系统中的气体吸积、相互作用和反馈过程。
AI.method: 使用JWST/NIRSpec-IFU观测7个低金属丰度星系系统，测量其金属丰度梯度。样本包括主星系（log(M*/M⊙)∼7.8-9.5）和3个卫星星系，分析其金属丰度、恒星形成率等参数，并与本地基本金属丰度关系进行比较。
AI.result: 1. 星系金属丰度梯度变化范围大（从正到负），平均梯度为-0.02±0.04 dex kpc⁻¹；2. 卫星星系金属丰度极低（3%-4% Z⊙），显著偏离本地基本金属丰度关系（ΔFMR≈-0.9 dex）；3. 有卫星星系的系统呈现平坦梯度，表明潮汐相互作用驱动星际介质混合；4. 两个源可能存在AGN，反馈可能导致平坦梯度；5. 一个源检测到正梯度，表明金属贫乏气体直接流入星系中心。
AI.conclusion: 早期宇宙星系通过多样化的、间歇性的过程生长，包括原始气体吸积、潮汐相互作用、合并事件和反馈机制。这些结果表明早期演化具有结构多样性，而非单一可预测的路径。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用JWST/NIRSpec-IFU对七个低金属丰度系统（红移z=7.2-9.5）的金属丰度梯度进行了研究。主样本的恒星质量范围为log(M_*/M_⊙) ~ 7.8-9.5，恒星形成率（SFR）为log(SFR / M_⊙ yr^{-1}) ~ 0.5-2.5，气相金属丰度为4%-15% Z_⊙。在样本中，我们还识别出与两个源相关的三个低金属丰度卫星星系，提供了早期宇宙相互作用的罕见视角。这三个卫星星系表现出更原始的性质，金属丰度为3%-4% Z_⊙，恒星形成活动较低（log(SFR / M_⊙ yr^{-1}) ~ -0.5至-0.9）。我们发现，我们的星系，尤其是卫星星系，显著偏离了局部基本金属丰度关系（FMR），偏差达到ΔFMR ≈ -0.9 dex。这表明这些星系可能正在经历强烈的原始气体吸积。总体而言，我们观测到径向金属丰度梯度存在较大离散，范围从正梯度到负梯度，平均金属丰度梯度为-0.02 ± 0.04 dex kpc^{-1}。在确认存在卫星星系的系统中发现了平坦梯度，表明潮汐相互作用和并合驱动了星际介质均匀化所需的径向混合。两个源中（初步）存在的活动星系核（AGN）表明，强烈的反馈也可能导致观测到的平坦梯度。相反，在一个源中检测到的正梯度指向金属贫乏气体流入直接汇聚到星系中心区域。这些结果表明，第一批十亿年内的星系通过多样化的、间歇性的过程生长，表明早期演化的特征在于结构多样性，而非单一可预测的路径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，早期宇宙星系通过多样化的、间歇性的过程生长，包括原始气体吸积、潮汐相互作用、合并事件和反馈机制。这些结果表明早期演化具有结构多样性，而非单一可预测的路径。

figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们七个主星系（粉色方块）和三个探测到的卫星星系（蓝色星形）的恒星形成主序（SFMS）。以不同形状的灰色点表示近期JWST观测结果，覆盖与我们样本相似的红移范围\(z\sim 3-10\)，来自Curti等人（2023）（圆圈）、Venturi等人（2024）（星形）、Chemerynska等人（2024）（六边形）、Heintz等人（2023b）（加号）和Pollock等人（2025）（菱形）。我们展示了Renzini和Peng（2015）在\(z=0\)处的SFMS，Simmonds等人（2025）在\(z\sim 3\)和\(z=8.45\)（即我们样本的平均红移）处的拟合结果，以及Heintz等人（2023b）在\(z=7-10\)处的结果。我们自己的线性拟合以黑色实线表示，其\(1\sigma\)置信区间以灰色阴影区域表示。

figures.caption_zh: 图2：我们七个主星系（粉色方块）和三个探测到的卫星星系（蓝色星形）的质量-金属丰度关系（MZR）。我们自己的线性拟合以黑色实线表示，其\(1\sigma\)置信区间以灰色阴影区域表示。上图：MZR与其他观测结果的比较。以不同形状的灰色点表示近期JWST观测结果，覆盖与我们样本相似的红移范围\(z\sim 3-10\)，来自Curti等人（2023）（圆圈）、Hsiao等人（2025）（三角形）、Venturi等人（2024）（星形）、Chemerynska等人（2024）（六边形）、Heintz等人（2023b）（加号）、Asada等人（2026）（叉号）和Pollock等人（2025）（菱形）。我们还与局部宇宙（Curti等人，2020b）、\(z\sim 3\)处矮星系（Li等人，2023）以及利用JWST观测覆盖\(z=3-10\)的各种最佳拟合（Morishita等人，2024；Curti等人，2023；Nakajima等人，2023；Sarkar等人，2025；Chemerynska等人，2024；Heintz等人，2023b；Pollock等人，2025）进行了比较。下图：MZR与相似红移处模拟和模型的比较。我们展示了来自FIRE（Ma等人，2016）、FirstLight（Langan等人，2020；Nakazato等人，2023）、FIRE-2 Marszewski等人（2024）、THESAN-ZOOM（McClymont等人，2026）、EAGLE（Schaye等人，2015）、IllustrisTNG（Torrey等人，2019）、假设演化IMF的Astraeus（Cueto等人，2024）和SERRA（Pallottini等人，2022）宇宙学模拟的高红移预测，以不同虚/点线和阴影区域表示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : The fundamental metallicity relation at \(z=7-10\) . Results for the main galaxies and satellites are shown as pink squares and blue stars, respectively. Left: \(\mu_{0.65}\) vs. metallicity relation (see equation 3 ). The local FMR by Curti et al. ( 2020b ) is shown as a solid dark blue line, which is extrapolated to lower \(\mu_{\alpha}\) indicated as a dashed line. Differently shaped grey scatter points indicate results covering similar redshifts of \(z\sim 3-13\) from various other publications (Curti et al. , 2024 ; Faisst et al. , 2025 ; Venturi et al. , 2024 ; Rowland et al. , 2026 ; Heintz et al. , 2023b ; Pollock et al. , 2025 ; Nishigaki et al. , 2025 ; Heintz et al. , 2025 ) . Our own linear fit is shown as a solid black line together with its \(1\sigma\) confidence interval as the shaded grey region. Our results are clearly below the local results, but occupy their own space that is parallel to the local relation. Right: Offset in metallicity from the local FMR (Curti et al. , 2020b ) plotted against the age of the universe and redshift. We compare to other observations covering redshifts from the local Universe up to \(z\sim 9\) (Sanders et al. , 2021 ; Faisst et al. , 2025 ; Rowland et al. , 2026 ; Sarkar et al. , 2025 ; Curti et al. , 2024 ; Pollock et al. , 2025 ; Nishigaki et al. , 2025 ) and the predictions from Nishigaki et al. ( 2025 ) . We observe a clear trend of the FMR offset increasing with increasing redshift.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：\(z=7-10\)处的基本金属丰度关系。主星系和卫星星系的结果分别以粉色方块和蓝色星形表示。左图：\(\mu_{0.65}\)与金属丰度关系（见方程3）。Curti等人（2020b）的局部FMR以深蓝色实线表示，外推至较低\(\mu_{\alpha}\)处以虚线表示。不同形状的灰色散点表示覆盖相似红移范围\(z\sim 3-13\)的其他出版物结果（Curti等人，2024；Faisst等人，2025；Venturi等人，2024；Rowland等人，2026；Heintz等人，2023b；Pollock等人，2025；Nishigaki等人，2025；Heintz等人，2025）。我们自己的线性拟合以黑色实线表示，其\(1\sigma\)置信区间以灰色阴影区域表示。我们的结果明显低于局部结果，但占据了一个与局部关系平行的独立空间。右图：与局部FMR（Curti等人，2020b）的金属丰度偏移量，作为宇宙年龄和红移的函数。我们与覆盖从局部宇宙到\(z\sim 9\)红移范围的其他观测结果（Sanders等人，2021；Faisst等人，2025；Rowland等人，2026；Sarkar等人，2025；Curti等人，2024；Pollock等人，2025；Nishigaki等人，2025）以及Nishigaki等人（2025）的预测进行了比较。我们观察到FMR偏移量随红移增加而增大的明显趋势。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Gas-phase metallicity gradients ( \(dex/kpc\) ) as a function of redshift and age of the universe (Gyr). The sources from our sample are indicated as pink squares. We provide redshift-binned means (large blue stars) by combining observational results from the literature and our results. All other grey symbols represent a compilation of results from other observations spanning all of cosmic time. Most notably, we present results for the local universe ( \(z\lesssim 1\) ) by Stanghellini et al. ( 2014 ); Stott et al. ( 2014 ); Belfiore et al. ( 2017 ); Carton et al. ( 2018 ) and cosmic noon ( \(1\leq z\lesssim 3\) ) by Jones et al. ( 2013 , 2015 ); Förster Schreiber et al. ( 2018 ); Curti et al. ( 2020a ); Simons et al. ( 2021 ); Wang et al. ( 2022 ); Ju et al. ( 2025 ) . We use hatched regions to depict larger samples. Past the cosmic noon, observations start to become sparse with redshifts \(3\leq z\lesssim 6\) still having a good number of data points (e.g. Troncoso et al. , 2014 ; Tripodi et al. , 2024 ; Fujimoto et al. , 2025b ; Stanghellini et al. , 2026 ; Lee et al. , 2026 ) . However, there are only a handful of observations towards even higher redshift simply due to the lack of available, and with good enough S/N, data (e.g. Arribas et al. , 2024 ; Vallini et al. , 2024 ; Venturi et al. , 2024 ; Li et al. , 2025b ; Ivey et al. , 2026 ) . In this redshift regime, most previous observational studies have only encompassed a few galaxies and are unable to cover larger samples, and do not reach beyond \(z\sim 8\) . In addition to observations, we also conduct a comparison with predictions from recent cosmological simulations, shown as differently dashed and dotted dark blue lines: EAGLE (Tissera et al. , 2022 ) , which extends from the local universe to the cosmic noon, and FIRE-2 (Sun et al. , 2025a ) , covering the epoch of reionisation. figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Gas-Phase Metallicity Gradients vs. Stellar Mass (left) and sSFR (right). We show our results as pink squares and compare them to observations covering similar redshifts (Vallini et al. , 2024 ; Arribas et al. , 2024 ; Venturi et al. , 2024 ) using differently shaped symbols. Furthermore, we also compare our linear relation to that obtained by Li et al. ( 2025b ) for galaxies at \(5 Sun et al. ( 2025a ) . Our linear fit is shown as a solid black line with the \(1\sigma\) confidence interval as a grey band. Among our results, we see a clear positive dependence on the stellar mass: lower-mass sources exhibit more flat to slightly negative gradients, while higher mass galaxies tend to have more positive gradients. The scatter and gradients’ slope uncertainties also decrease with increasing stellar mass. In contrast, a negative correlation is observed between sSFR and metallicity gradient. Both subplots include the Spearman rank coefficient and the associated p-value. According to these values, the stellar-mass relation shows a moderate but statistically non-significant trend, whereas no significant correlation is found with sSFR.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：气相金属丰度梯度与恒星质量（左图）和sSFR（右图）的关系。我们以粉色方块显示结果，并与覆盖相似红移的观测结果（Vallini等人，2024；Arribas等人，2024；Venturi等人，2024）进行比较，使用不同形状的符号。此外，我们还将我们的线性关系与Li等人（2025b）在\(5 Sun等人（2025a）获得的结果进行了比较。我们的线性拟合以黑色实线表示，\(1\sigma\)置信区间以灰色带表示。在我们的结果中，我们看到了对恒星质量的明显正依赖：质量较低的源表现出更平坦至略负的梯度，而质量较高的星系倾向于具有更正的梯度。梯度的离散度和斜率不确定性也随恒星质量增加而减小。相反，sSFR与金属丰度梯度之间观察到负相关。两个子图均包含Spearman秩相关系数和相关的p值。根据这些值，恒星质量关系显示出中等但统计上不显著的趋势，而sSFR未发现显著相关性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : NIRSpec IFU cutouts of the two sources containing satellite galaxies. The NIRSpec IFU cubes were collapsed around the \([OIII]\lambda 5007\) emission line, and the blue contour lines represent the F277W NIRCam filter. title: Large Interstellar Polarisation Survey. III. Observational constraints on the structure of grains
summary: Dust in the diffuse interstellar medium remains incompletely understood with regard to the structure, composition, size distribution, and alignment properties of the grains. Joint observations of reddening, starlight polarisation spectra, and polarised dust emission for individual sightlines provide essential constraints on such properties. We study a far-UV selected sample of 96 reddening curves, for which optical linear polarisation spectra were obtained with FORS at the VLT as part of the Large Interstellar Polarisation Survey (LIPS). Starlight polarisation spectra for 60 stars are presented in this work. These data are combined with Gaia distance estimates and Planck thermal dust emission. A three-component dust model is made publicly available. It consists of nanoparticles, amorphous grains, and micrometre-sized dust agglomerates, varying axial ratios, porosities, sizes, element abundances, and alignment efficiencies to match the observations. The diversity of reddening and polarisation spectra is well reproduced by prolate grains with typical axial ratios of two, a porosity of 10%, and high alignment efficiencies. Such efficiencies can be achieved with radiative torque alignment theory (RAT), but not with imperfect Davis-Greenstein (IDG) alignment, except when adjusting the magnetic-field orientation to maximise the polarisation. Micrometre-sized dust contributes wavelength-independent grey extinction in the optical, accounts for about one-third of the visual extinction, and carries one-third of the dust mass. A follow-up submillimetre survey with high-resolution polarimetry will further constrain grain shapes and alignment physics.

AI.tldr: 研究通过联合观测星际红化、星光偏振光谱和偏振尘埃发射，构建了三组分尘埃模型，成功解释了观测数据的多样性，发现微米级尘埃贡献了约三分之一的视觉消光和尘埃质量。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 弥漫星际介质中的尘埃在结构、组成、粒径分布和排列特性方面仍未被完全理解。对单个视线方向的消光、星光偏振光谱和偏振尘埃发射的联合观测为这些特性提供了重要约束。我们研究了一个远紫外选定的96条消光曲线样本，其光学线性偏振光谱由甚大望远镜（VLT）上的FORS仪器作为大型星际偏振巡天（LIPS）的一部分获得。本文展示了60颗恒星的星光偏振光谱。这些数据与盖亚（Gaia）距离估计和普朗克（Planck）热尘埃发射相结合。一个三组分尘埃模型已公开提供。该模型包含纳米颗粒、非晶态尘埃颗粒和微米级尘埃团聚体，通过改变轴比、孔隙率、尺寸、元素丰度和排列效率来匹配观测结果。消光和偏振光谱的多样性可以通过典型的轴比为2、孔隙率为10%且具有高排列效率的扁长尘埃颗粒很好地再现。这种效率可以通过辐射扭矩排列理论（RAT）实现，但无法通过不完美的戴维斯-格林斯坦（IDG）排列实现，除非调整磁场方向以最大化偏振。微米级尘埃在光学波段产生与波长无关的灰色消光，约占视觉消光的三分之一，并承载三分之一的尘埃质量。后续的高分辨率偏振亚毫米巡天将进一步约束颗粒形状和排列物理机制。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，三组分尘埃模型成功解释了观测数据的多样性，高分辨率亚毫米偏振测量将进一步约束颗粒形状和排列物理机制。

title: Introducing sapphire: Towards Hybrid Physics-Informed, Data-Driven Modeling of Galaxy Formation
comment: Submitted to ApJ, main body is 30 pages, comments welcome, code to reproduce analysis and figures at https://github.com/virajpandya/sapphire
summary: Semi-analytic models (SAMs) have been treating galaxy populations as dynamical systems for $\gtrsim50$ years, but their evolution equations remain poorly constrained. We introduce sapphire, a modular, automatically differentiable, GPU-accelerated SAM written from scratch in JAX. For the first time, we compute exact Jacobian matrices of our nonlinear differential equations and show that they have interpretable, non-random structures, using the Pandya et al. (2023) physical model as an initial example. Both local and global sensitivity analyses reveal that supernova energy loading is a key astrophysical parameter for galaxy evolution. We use gradient descent and Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (HMC) to perform comprehensive mock parameter recovery tests. These indicate that the z=0 stellar-to-halo-mass relation alone does not contain enough information to infer many astrophysical parameters. Using observations of star-forming galaxies from the MaNGA survey and the Behroozi et al. (2019) empirical model as one baseline, we derive multiple posteriors assuming different combinations of data, including z=0 interstellar medium gas fractions and metallicities. The inferred physical parameters suggest that galaxies self-regulate their star formation primarily through preventative rather than ejective feedback. Both Fisher and HMC forecasts demonstrate the potential of sapphire to enable precision inference for galaxy formation, but more work is needed to expand its library of models. We discuss how our unique blend of differentiability, massive GPU parallelization, numerical robustness and principled Bayesian methods sets the stage for hybrid physics-informed, data-driven discovery of galaxy formation astrophysics and cosmology. We make sapphire publicly available at https://github.com/virajpandya/sapphire.

AI.tldr: 研究人员开发了sapphire，一个基于JAX的模块化、可自动微分、GPU加速的半解析星系形成模型，首次计算了非线性微分方程的精确雅可比矩阵，并通过梯度下降和哈密顿蒙特卡洛方法进行参数恢复测试。
AI.motivation: 半解析模型（SAMs）作为星系形成的动力学系统已使用超过50年，但其演化方程仍缺乏充分约束。传统模型难以计算精确的雅可比矩阵，限制了参数敏感性分析和贝叶斯推断的能力。
AI.method: 开发了sapphire模型，采用JAX框架实现模块化、可自动微分、GPU加速的架构。使用Pandya等人（2023）物理模型作为初始示例，计算非线性微分方程的精确雅可比矩阵。结合梯度下降和哈密顿蒙特卡洛（HMC）进行参数恢复测试，利用MaNGA巡天观测数据和Behroozi等人（2019）经验模型作为基准。
AI.result: 雅可比矩阵显示出可解释的非随机结构。敏感性分析表明超新星能量加载是星系演化的关键天体物理参数。参数恢复测试显示仅凭z=0恒星-晕质量关系不足以推断许多天体物理参数。推断的物理参数表明星系主要通过预防性而非喷出性反馈自我调节恒星形成。Fisher和HMC预测展示了sapphire在精确推断方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: sapphire通过可微分性、大规模GPU并行化、数值鲁棒性和原则性贝叶斯方法的独特结合，为星系形成天体物理学和宇宙学的混合物理信息数据驱动发现奠定了基础。该模型已开源，但需要扩展其模型库以进一步提升能力。

artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，sapphire通过可微分性、大规模GPU并行化、数值鲁棒性和原则性贝叶斯方法的独特结合，为星系形成天体物理学和宇宙学的混合物理信息数据驱动发现奠定了基础。该模型已开源，但需要扩展其模型库以进一步提升能力。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Schematic overview of sapphire . The innermost boxes with solid black borders list the five universal ingredients of any dynamical system: state variables \(\vec{x}\) , evolution equations \(\vec{f}\) , free parameters \(\vec{\theta}\) , initial conditions \(\vec{x}_{0}\) and forcing functions \(\vec{g}\) . We built sapphire to be differentiable so that we can add small, interpretable neural networks \(\vec{f}_{NN}\) to correct model mis-specification (dotted black border). The values and functional forms of these components are dictated by multiple sub-domains spanning both astrophysics and cosmology (blue boxes). The reader is directed to Figure 1 of Pandya et al. ( 2023 ) for a visualization of our baseline physical model. Our goal is to discover the unknown, nonlinear, time-dependent structure of this dynamical system using hybrid physics-informed, data-driven techniques, which requires input from both observations and hydrodynamical simulations (yellow arrows). Achieving this requires bridging several foundational interdisciplinary areas including robust numerical methods, GPU parallelization, modular and reproducible code, Bayesian inference techniques and automatic differentiation for training and interpreting neural corrections to baseline dynamical models (outer gray boxes).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：sapphire的示意图。带有实线黑色边框的最内层方框列出了任何动力系统的五个通用要素：状态变量\(\vec{x}\)、演化方程\(\vec{f}\)、自由参数\(\vec{\theta}\)、初始条件\(\vec{x}_{0}\)和强迫函数\(\vec{g}\)。我们构建了可微分的sapphire，以便添加小型、可解释的神经网络\(\vec{f}_{NN}\)来纠正模型错误设定（虚线黑色边框）。这些组件的值和函数形式由涵盖天体物理学和宇宙学的多个子领域决定（蓝色方框）。读者可参考Pandya等人（2023）的图1以了解我们基线物理模型的可视化。我们的目标是利用混合物理信息数据驱动技术，发现该动力系统的未知、非线性、时间依赖结构，这需要来自观测和流体动力学模拟的输入（黄色箭头）。实现这一目标需要桥接几个基础跨学科领域，包括鲁棒数值方法、GPU并行化、模块化和可复现代码、贝叶斯推断技术，以及用于训练和解释基线动力模型神经校正的自动微分（外部灰色方框）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Flowchart illustrating our galaxy population evolution model that bridges numerics, cosmology, astrophysics and Bayesian statistics. We first choose our numerical setup (ODE solver, automatic differentiation method and parallelization strategy). Next, we interpolate halo merger trees which provides initial conditions and forcing functions for our galaxy formation ODE system. In principle, this step can involve cosmology variations but we neglect that here. After drawing the astrophysical parameters from their respective priors, we evolve the ODE system for our ensemble of galaxies in parallel, compute summary statistics with differentiable Gaussian kernel regression, and finally compute the explicit assumed Gaussian likelihood and its gradient with respect to each astrophysical parameter. The latter enables efficient Bayesian MAP optimization and/or Hamiltonian Monte Carlo inference.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：展示我们星系种群演化模型的流程图，该模型连接了数值方法、宇宙学、天体物理学和贝叶斯统计。我们首先选择数值设置（ODE求解器、自动微分方法和并行化策略）。接着，我们插值暗物质晕合并树，这为我们的星系形成ODE系统提供了初始条件和强迫函数。原则上，此步骤可涉及宇宙学变化，但我们在此忽略。在从各自先验中抽取天体物理参数后，我们并行演化星系集合的ODE系统，通过可微分高斯核回归计算汇总统计量，最后计算显式假设的高斯似然及其相对于每个天体物理参数的梯度。后者能够实现高效的贝叶斯MAP优化和/或哈密顿蒙特卡洛推断。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Prior predictive checks for the three \(z=0\) galaxy scaling relations we focus on in this paper. In each panel, the black line comes from data and the gray lines are draws from uniform priors for model parameters. Left: stellar-mass-halo-mass relation. Middle: total ISM-to-stellar-mass ratios as a function of stellar mass. Right: ISM mass-metallicity relation. The prior predictive checks span the range of the data. In the right panel, we further show the effect of turning off pre-enriched halo inflows (magenta lines) which causes the ISM MZRs to reach a lower floor compared to our fiducial model. This will be used in Subsection VI.4 to interpret our baseline posteriors and illustrate the impact of MZR systematics.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：本文关注的三个\(z=0\)星系标度关系的先验预测检验。在每个面板中，黑色线条来自数据，灰色线条来自模型参数均匀先验的抽样。左图：恒星质量-暗物质晕质量关系。中图：总ISM与恒星质量之比随恒星质量的变化。右图：ISM质量-金属丰度关系。先验预测检验覆盖了数据的范围。在右图中，我们进一步展示了关闭预富集晕内流（品红色线条）的效果，这导致ISM MZR达到比我们基准模型更低的平台。这将在第VI.4节中用于解释我们的基线后验分布并说明MZR系统误差的影响。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Example Jacobian at a random point in parameter space for a single MW-mass halo showing the exact \(z=0\) sensitivity of the ODE state variables to parameter variations. The non-random structure of this Jacobian encodes the astrophysics and locally linearized dynamics of our galaxy formation model. Note that the colorbar uses a symmetric log normalization. The greatest sensitivity is to the energy loading normalization (third column). Mass loading sensitivity is weaker and has the opposite effect of energy loading for many state variables. Metal loading only affects the metal mass state variables (lower right). There is only mild sensitivity to the ISM depletion time parameters.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在参数空间中随机点处，单个MW质量暗物质晕的示例雅可比矩阵，展示了ODE状态变量对参数变化的精确\(z=0\)敏感性。该雅可比矩阵的非随机结构编码了星系形成模型的天体物理学和局部线性化动力学。注意色标使用对称对数归一化。最大敏感性出现在能量加载归一化（第三列）。质量加载敏感性较弱，且对许多状态变量的影响与能量加载相反。金属加载仅影响金属质量状态变量（右下）。对ISM耗尽时间参数的敏感性较弱。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Fractional sensitivity across parameter space for a range of halo masses. Brighter colors correspond to higher sensitivities. The 2D histogram panels show the ratio of the norm of each Jacobian column (parameter sensitivity) to the norm of the entire Jacobian matrix as a function of parameter value and halo mass. The combined sensitivity of all state variables to \(A_{E}\) dominates over their sensitivity to the other parameters. The \(A_{E}\) sensitivity drops for low-mass halos in high \(A_{E}\) and/or very steep \(\alpha_{E}^{0}\) realizations because we clip \(\eta_{E}\leq 1\) . The cyan dotted lines mark the parameter values of the example Jacobian for the single MW-mass halo from Figure 4 . The lack of sensitivity for the four slope parameters near \(\log M_{vir}/M_{\odot}\sim 11.8\) is due to reference point \(V_{vir}\approx 125\) km s -1 in our power law functional form where the gradient with respect to \(\alpha\) naturally goes to zero.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：不同暗物质晕质量范围内参数空间上的分数敏感性。较亮的颜色对应较高的敏感性。二维直方图面板显示了每个雅可比列范数（参数敏感性）与整个雅可比矩阵范数之比随参数值和暗物质晕质量的变化。所有状态变量对\(A_{E}\)的综合敏感性超过了对其他参数的敏感性。在低质量暗物质晕且\(A_{E}\)较高和/或\(\alpha_{E}^{0}\)非常陡峭的实现中，\(A_{E}\)敏感性下降，因为我们限制了\(\eta_{E}\leq 1\)。青色虚线标记了图4中单个MW质量暗物质晕示例雅可比矩阵的参数值。在\(\log M_{vir}/M_{\odot}\sim 11.8\)附近，四个斜率参数缺乏敏感性，这是由于我们幂律函数形式中的参考点\(V_{vir}\approx 125\) km s -1，在该点处相对于\(\alpha\)的梯度自然为零。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Mock parameter recovery tests using different combinations of \(z=0\) quasi-observable scaling relations in the best case scenario of no measurement uncertainties. Circles and errorbars show the MAP and Fisher uncertainty from adam . Crosses indicate that all three adam trajectories ended at a saddle point and we report only the lowest-loss solution. The top three rows with the gray background reflect our default progression for the rest of this paper: starting with SMHM as the only constraint (teal), then adding \(f_{ISM}\) (indigo), and subsequently adding ISM MZR (orange). The next four rows show other possible combinations of one or two relations. The best precision and accuracy are achieved when all three constraints are combined. In other cases, \(A_{E}\) is well recovered but there are often saddle points leading to poor convergence for the other parameters. Note how, in our default progression, combining SMHM and \(f_{ISM}\) pins down the ISM depletion time and energy loading, but strong degeneracies remain between mass and metal loading. Incorporating the ISM MZR distinguishes mass and metal loading parameters with smaller uncertainties. The sheer number of mock parameter optimizations here (300 adam trajectories per row; 2100 in total) demonstrates the power of sapphire to accelerate model calibration and development.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：在无测量不确定性的最佳情况下，使用不同\(z=0\)准可观测标度关系组合的模拟参数恢复测试。圆圈和误差棒显示了来自adam的MAP和Fisher不确定性。叉号表示所有三条adam轨迹均终止于鞍点，我们仅报告损失最低的解。灰色背景的前三行反映了本文的默认进展：从仅使用SMHM（青色）开始，然后添加\(f_{ISM}\)（靛蓝色），随后添加ISM MZR（橙色）。接下来的四行显示了其他可能的单关系或双关系组合。当所有三个约束条件结合时，实现了最佳精度和准确度。在其他情况下，\(A_{E}\)恢复良好，但其他参数常因鞍点导致收敛不佳。注意，在我们的默认进展中，结合SMHM和\(f_{ISM}\)确定了ISM耗尽时间和能量加载，但质量加载和金属加载之间仍存在强简并。引入ISM MZR以更小的不确定性区分了质量加载和金属加载参数。此处大量的模拟参数优化（每行300条adam轨迹；共2100条）展示了sapphire加速模型校准和开发的能力。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Mock parameter recovery summary statistics for our default progression of combining SMHM, \(f_{ISM}\) and ISM MZR (i.e., the top three rows from Figure 6 ). This is the best case with no measurement uncertainties. Top row: Precision as quantified by Fisher parameter uncertainties normalized by the MAP parameter value. The errorbars denote the 16, 50 and 84th percentiles from all mock realizations. Naturally, uncertainties improve as more constraints are included: teal for only \(M_{*}/M_{h}\) , purple when adding \(f_{ISM}\) , and orange when further including the ISM MZR. Second row: Bias defined as the deviation of the MAP from the true parameter value normalized by the true minimum Fisher curvature. We are generally within \(\pm 1\sigma\) of the true minimum and hence unbiased. Third row: optimization failure rate (fraction of mocks where all 3 adam optimizers ended at a saddle point) drops as we add more constraints. With \(M_{*}/M_{h}\) alone, there are many more false saddle points for gradient descent to get stuck in. Fourth row: condition number of the Fisher matrix (proxy for parameter degeneracy strength) also drops as we add more constraints.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：我们默认进展（结合SMHM、\(f_{ISM}\)和ISM MZR，即图6的前三行）的模拟参数恢复汇总统计。这是无测量不确定性的最佳情况。第一行：精度，由Fisher参数不确定性除以MAP参数值量化。误差棒表示所有模拟实现中的第16、50和84百分位数。自然，随着包含更多约束，不确定性改善：仅\(M_{*}/M_{h}\)为青色，添加\(f_{ISM}\)为紫色，进一步包含ISM MZR为橙色。第二行：偏差，定义为MAP与真实参数值之差除以真实最小Fisher曲率。我们通常处于真实最小值的\(\pm 1\sigma\)内，因此无偏。第三行：优化失败率（所有3个adam优化器均终止于鞍点的模拟比例）随着添加更多约束而下降。仅使用\(M_{*}/M_{h}\)时，梯度下降陷入的虚假鞍点更多。第四行：Fisher矩阵的条件数（参数简并强度的代理）也随着添加更多约束而下降。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Dependence of mock precision (black) and bias (blue) on assumed observational uncertainty. The left (right) column shows amplitude (slope) parameters. The fiducial observational uncertainty reflects our data as described in Section II and Appendix A . Here we always fit to all three \(z=0\) scaling relations and the errorbars reflect the 16-84 percentile spread across 100 random mocks. The precision improves as the observational error decreases, following a roughly linear behavior. The bias, defined as in Figure 7 , also remains high. The larger spread in bias for smaller errors reflects the lack of tuning of adam hyper-parameters to account for very steep loss landscapes, but that is unimportant for this paper.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：模拟精度（黑色）和偏差（蓝色）对假设观测不确定性的依赖性。左列（右列）显示振幅（斜率）参数。基准观测不确定性反映了我们在第II节和附录A中描述的数据。此处我们始终拟合所有三个\(z=0\)标度关系，误差棒反映了100个随机模拟中的16-84百分位数范围。精度随着观测误差减小而提高，大致呈线性行为。偏差（如图7定义）也保持较高。较小误差下偏差的较大散布反映了adam超参数未针对非常陡峭的损失景观进行调整，但这对于本文并不重要。

title: The Galaxy Activity, Torus, and outflow Survey (GATOS) XIII: Coupling Driven H2 Excitation in Seyferts
summary: We utilize JWST/MIRI IFU observations from the Galaxy Activity, Torus and Outflow Survey (GATOS) to investigate the diverse range of ionized outflow rates of obscured AGN with similar bolometric luminosity and explore potential associations with AGN feedback. We explore spatial correlations between ionized emission potentially associated with fast shocks ([Fe II]5.34μm) and the excitation of H2. We further constrain our investigation to the inner 400 pc (the nuclear and circumnuclear regions r < 200 pc), and estimate the excitation temperature and column density of H2 assuming local thermodynamic equilibrium (LTE) and using the S(1) to S(8) rotational H2 emission lines visible to JWST/MIRI spectroscopy. We report the molecular gas temperature of the deprojected 400 pc nuclear region to correlate with the ionized mass outflow rate. We also observe the stronger degree of spatial correlation between [Fe II]5.34um emission and H2 gas temperature. We observe regions of enhanced [Fe II]5.34μm / [Ar II]6.99μm spatially coincident with the ionization cones of objects with higher ionized outflow rate and [Fe II]5.34μm / [Ar II]6.99μm in the deprojected 400 pc nuclear region to scale positively with both ionized outflow rate and estimated molecular gas temperature. We do not observe the estimated jet cavity power within the central 400 pc to strongly correlate with the ionized mass outflow rate or molecular gas temperature of the nuclear region. We take the preceding observations to suggest a higher degree of interaction between AGN outflows and the circumnuclear disk.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST/MIRI IFU观测研究遮蔽型AGN的电离外流速率多样性及其与AGN反馈的关联，发现核区分子气体温度与电离质量外流率相关，[Fe II]发射与H2气体温度空间相关性更强。
AI.motivation: 研究具有相似玻尔兹曼光度的遮蔽型活动星系核(AGN)的电离外流速率多样性，探索其与AGN反馈的潜在关联，特别是通过分析电离发射与H2激发之间的空间相关性。
AI.method: 使用JWST/MIRI IFU观测数据，聚焦于内400pc核区和环核区(r<200pc)。采用局部热力学平衡(LTE)假设，利用S(1)到S(8)旋转H2发射线估算H2的激发温度和柱密度。分析[Fe II]5.34μm与[Ar II]6.99μm比值空间分布，研究电离外流率与分子气体温度的相关性。
AI.result: 发现去投影400pc核区的分子气体温度与电离质量外流率相关。[Fe II]5.34μm发射与H2气体温度的空间相关性更强。在电离外流率较高的天体电离锥区域，观察到增强的[Fe II]/[Ar II]比值，该比值与电离外流率和分子气体温度呈正相关。中央400pc内的估计喷流腔功率与电离质量外流率或核区分子气体温度无强相关性。
AI.conclusion: 观测结果表明AGN外流与环核盘之间存在更高程度的相互作用，这可能是AGN反馈机制的重要表现，而喷流功率在此尺度上对电离外流和分子气体加热的直接影响相对较弱。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究的是近邻遮蔽型AGN的分子气体激发与电离外流，属于活动星系核反馈领域，与用户主要兴趣——高红移星系强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学及多相气体——在科学问题、方法和数据上均无直接关联。论文未涉及引力透镜，也未研究高红移星系。虽然作者列表包含Ric Davies，但用户核心作者群中Davies的权重主要来自高红移星系研究，而非AGN领域。论文主题（AGN torus、分子气体激发）与用户画像中的高权重关键词（如lens、cosmic noon、dust、dense gas）不匹配。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为近邻AGN反馈，用户主要兴趣为高红移星系强引力透镜及高红移星系动力学，两者科学问题不同。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。论文使用JWST/MIRI IFU光谱研究近邻AGN核区，用户常用方法为引力透镜建模、高分辨积分场光谱（如SINFONI、KMOS、ALMA）研究高红移星系。
recommendation.author_fit: 低。仅Ric Davies一人出现在用户核心作者列表中，但Davies在用户画像中的权重主要来自高红移星系合作（如PHIBSS、KMOS^3D），而非AGN研究。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。论文聚焦于AGN反馈的经典问题，与用户关注的高红移星系形成演化前沿不直接相关。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文完全不涉及引力透镜、高红移星系、高红移星系动力学或高红移多相气体等用户核心兴趣点。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用星系活动、环核盘和外流巡天（GATOS）的JWST/MIRI IFU观测数据，研究具有相似热光度但电离外流速率差异显著的遮蔽活动星系核（AGN），并探讨其与AGN反馈的潜在关联。我们分析了可能与快速激波相关的电离发射（[Fe II]5.34μm）与H₂激发之间的空间相关性。进一步将研究范围限定在内部400 pc（核区和环核区，r < 200 pc），假设局部热动平衡（LTE），利用JWST/MIRI光谱可见的S(1)至S(8)转动H₂发射线，估算H₂的激发温度和柱密度。我们发现，去投影后400 pc核区的分子气体温度与电离质量外流速率相关。同时，[Fe II]5.34μm发射与H₂气体温度之间存在更强的空间相关性。我们观测到[Fe II]5.34μm / [Ar II]6.99μm增强的区域与电离锥在空间上重合，这些区域对应电离外流速率较高的天体；在去投影的400 pc核区内，[Fe II]5.34μm / [Ar II]6.99μm比值与电离外流速率和估算的分子气体温度均呈正相关。我们未发现中心400 pc内估算的喷流空腔功率与核区电离质量外流速率或分子气体温度之间存在强相关性。基于上述观测，我们认为AGN外流与环核盘之间存在更高程度的相互作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，观测结果表明AGN外流与环核盘之间存在更高程度的相互作用，这可能是AGN反馈机制的重要表现，而喷流功率在此尺度上对电离外流和分子气体加热的直接影响相对较弱。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Galaxy Fundamental Parameters.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：星系基本参数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: \(H_{2}\) excitation temperature mapping for each object derived from the \(H_{2}\) 0-0 S(1)/S(5) line ratio. Panels are presented with estimated ionized mass outflow rate decreasing from top to bottom and left to right, with the highest ionized outflow rate in the top left (ESO 137-G034) and lowest in (MCG-05-23-16) in the bottom right. The dashed black line indicates the edges of the ionization bicone (see Table 1 ). The gray ellipse represents a deprojected aperture of the central 400 pc (r = 200 pc). For MCG 05-23-016, since no information on opening angle is available, a default of 60 ∘ has been used. Black contours represent the [Fe II] 5.34μm flux contours ranging from 10 -16.45 and 10 -15.7 erg \(s^{-1}\) \(cm^{-2}\) (0.25 dex steps) for ESO 137-34, 10 -15.95 and 10 -15.2 erg \(s^{-1}\) \(cm^{-2}\) (0.25 dex steps) for NGC 5506, 10 -16.7 and 10 -15.95 erg \(s^{-1}\) \(cm^{-2}\) (0.25 dex steps) for NGC 5728, 10 -17.2 and 10 -16.45 erg \(s^{-1}\) \(cm^{-2}\) (0.25 dex steps) for NGC 3081, 10 -16.6 and 10 -15.85 erg \(s^{-1}\) \(cm^{-2}\) (0.25 dex steps) for NGC 7172, and 10 -17.2 and 10 -16.45 erg \(s^{-1}\) \(cm^{-2}\) (0.25 dex steps) for MCG-0523-016. The gray dashed regions depict nuclear aperture investigated in Section IV .

Figure 2: Dice coefficient (left panel) and Pearson Coefficient (right panel) calculated from the \(H_{2}\) excitation map and [Fe II] 5.34μm emission map vs. the ionized outflow rate for each target.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：由\(H_{2}\)激发图和[Fe II] 5.34μm发射图计算的Dice系数（左图）和Pearson系数（右图）与每个目标的电离外流速率的关系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: [Fe II] 5.34μm / [Ar II] 6.99μm map vs. the ionized outflow rate for each target. Panels are presented with estimated ionized mass outflow rate increasing from top to bottom and left to right, with the highest ionized outflow rate in the top left (ESO 137-G034) and lowest in (MCG-05-23-16) in the bottom right). title: The Non-Gaussian Weak-Lensing Likelihood: A Multivariate Copula Construction and Impact on Cosmological Constraints
summary: We present a framework to compute non-Gaussian likelihoods for two-point correlation functions. The non-Gaussianity is most pronounced on large scales that will be well-measured by stage-IV weak-lensing surveys. We show how such a multivariate likelihood can be constructed and efficiently evaluated using a copula approach by incorporating exact one-dimensional marginals and a dependence structure derived from the exact multivariate likelihood. The copula likelihood is found to be in better agreement with simulated sampling distributions of correlation functions than Gaussian likelihoods, particularly on large scales. We furthermore investigate the effect of the non-Gaussian copula likelihood on posterior inference, including sampling the full parameter space of contemporary weak-lensing analyses. We find parameter shifts in $S_8$ on the order of one standard deviation for $1 \ 000 \ \mathrm{deg}^2$ surveys but negligible shifts for areas of $10 \ 000 \ \mathrm{deg}^2$, suggesting Gaussian likelihoods are sufficient for stage-IV surveys, though results depend on the detailed mask geometry and data-vector structure.

title: Primordial magnetic fields in the light of upcoming post-EoR Lyman-$α$ and 21-cm observations
comment: 25 pages, 10 sets of figures, 3 tables. Comments are welcome
summary: The Lorentz force exerted by a primordial magnetic field (PMF) on the coupled baryon-dark matter system may enhance total matter power at small scales after recombination. In the post-reionization (post-EoR) era, a weakly scale-dependent PMF of sub-nG strength is thus expected to influence the Lyman-$α$ (Ly$α$) power spectrum, the 21 cm power spectrum, and the Ly$α$-21 cm cross-spectrum at scales $k\gtrsim 1\:h/\textrm{Mpc}$. We investigate the prospects of constraining the PMF sector via these three cosmological observables, by employing SNR estimation and Fisher forecast on the PMF amplitude $B_0$ and spectral index $n_{\rm B}$, for a next-generation DESI-like spectroscopic survey and two upcoming 21 cm facilities, namely SKA1-Mid and PUMA. Our results indicate the possibility of constraining both PMF parameters with $\lesssim10\%$ relative errors through the uncontaminated 21 cm auto-spectrum as well as the Ly$α$-21 cm cross-spectrum probed with the DESI-like+SKA1-Mid combination. Indicatively, the Ly$α$-21 cm cross-correlation via DESI-like+SKA1-Mid is predicted to constrain a fiducial scenario $B_0=0.8$ nG and $n_{\rm B}=-2.9$ with $1σ$ errors $ΔB_0\approx 0.07$ nG and $Δn_{\rm B}\approx0.02$. The DESI-like+PUMA setup is predicted to fare relatively worse due to its restriction to larger scales, resulting in comparatively one order of magnitude relaxed error bounds for similar fiducials. Since the Ly$α$-21 cm cross-signal is expected to be largely insensitive to foreground contamination (unlike the 21 cm auto-spectrum), it may serve as an optimal foreground-immune post-EoR probe to constrain a weakly scale-dependent sub-nG PMF via future DESI-like+SKA1-Mid observations.

AI.tldr: 研究利用Lyα功率谱、21cm功率谱及其交叉谱约束原初磁场参数的前景，通过DESI-like+SKA1-Mid组合有望以约10%的相对误差约束磁场振幅和谱指数。
AI.motivation: 原初磁场通过洛伦兹力影响重子-暗物质耦合系统，可能在重组后增强小尺度总物质功率。在再电离后时代，亚纳高斯强度的弱尺度依赖原初磁场预计会影响Lyα功率谱、21cm功率谱及其交叉谱，这为约束原初磁场参数提供了新的观测机会。
AI.method: 采用信噪比估计和Fisher预报方法，针对DESI-like光谱巡天、SKA1-Mid和PUMA三种未来观测设施，分析Lyα功率谱、21cm功率谱及其交叉谱对原初磁场振幅B₀和谱指数n_B的约束能力。
AI.result: 21cm自功率谱和Lyα-21cm交叉谱（DESI-like+SKA1-Mid组合）都能以≲10%的相对误差约束两个PMF参数。对于基准场景B₀=0.8 nG、n_B=-2.9，DESI-like+SKA1-Mid交叉相关预测1σ误差ΔB₀≈0.07 nG、Δn_B≈0.02。DESI-like+PUMA组合由于局限于更大尺度，误差界限相对宽松一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: Lyα-21cm交叉信号对前景污染不敏感（与21cm自功率谱不同），可能成为未来DESI-like+SKA1-Mid观测中约束弱尺度依赖亚纳高斯原初磁场的理想前景免疫探针。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 原初磁场（PMF）对耦合的重子-暗物质系统施加的洛伦兹力可能在复合后增强小尺度上的总物质功率。在再电离后（post-EoR）时代，一个弱尺度依赖的亚纳高斯强度PMF预期会影响Lyman-α（Lyα）功率谱、21厘米功率谱以及Lyα-21厘米交叉谱，尺度为\(k\gtrsim 1\:h/\textrm{Mpc}\)。我们通过信噪比估计和Fisher预测，针对下一代DESI-like光谱巡天和两个即将开展的21厘米设施（即SKA1-Mid和PUMA），研究了利用这三个宇宙学观测量约束PMF参数（振幅\(B_0\)和谱指数\(n_{\rm B}\)）的前景。我们的结果表明，通过未受污染的21厘米自功率谱以及DESI-like+SKA1-Mid组合探测的Lyα-21厘米交叉谱，有可能以\(\lesssim10\%\)的相对误差约束这两个PMF参数。指示性地，通过DESI-like+SKA1-Mid的Lyα-21厘米互相关预计能以\(1σ\)误差\(\Delta B_0\approx 0.07\) nG和\(\Delta n_{\rm B}\approx0.02\)约束一个基准情景\(B_0=0.8\) nG和\(n_{\rm B}=-2.9\)。由于受限于较大尺度，DESI-like+PUMA组合的预测表现相对较差，导致类似基准下的误差界限宽松约一个数量级。由于Lyα-21厘米交叉信号预期对前景污染基本不敏感（与21厘米自功率谱不同），它可能作为最优的前景免疫的post-EoR探针，通过未来的DESI-like+SKA1-Mid观测来约束弱尺度依赖的亚纳高斯PMF。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：Lyα-21厘米交叉信号对前景污染不敏感（与21厘米自功率谱不同），可能成为未来DESI-like+SKA1-Mid观测中约束弱尺度依赖亚纳高斯原初磁场的理想前景免疫探针。
